channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Great DEI Defunding
item.description: The Trump administration is quietly but effectively targeting a system that has long favored the left.

item.title: El-Sayed challenges Jake Tapper's Iran questions in heated interview
item.description: Abdul El-Sayed, a Democratic Senate candidate in Michigan, pushed back on CNN host Jake Tapper's questions about Iran during a tense exchange on Sunday.

item.title: Pro-Palestine advocacy groups file lawsuit with no real grievances
item.description: The lawsuit essentially writes its own motion to dismiss.

item.title: Body found at Boston home owned by Rep. Ayanna Pressley's husband
item.description: Boston police discovered a body inside a home owned by Rep. Ayanna Pressley's husband on Saturday.
